title: Syncing across devices
question: How should a user's notes get from one device to another?
rationale: Syncing through a shared folder (like the one the user already pays for) lets us add multi-device support without running our own server or accounts. It's decided, but not built yet — the first version still saves only to the local file from d1.

options.label: Sync through the user's own cloud folder

tradeoffs.note: read and write one shared folder; no server of our own
uses storage the user already has
we rely on whichever folder service they use
a server and accounts to build and maintain
